pwa.updateBody: A new version of the app is ready.
pwa.installedBody: F2P Tracker is now available as a standalone app.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of {{count}} F2P Steam games tracked in this repository.

games.title: Games
games.subtitle: Browse, search, and filter the catalog. Click a row for full details.
games.bulkDeleteConfirm_one:
Delete {{count}} game from data shards?
The records also get appended to scripts/removed_games.jsonl.

This is destructive — cannot be undone via the UI.
games.bulkDeleteConfirm_other:
Delete {{count}} games from data shards?
The records also get appended to scripts/removed_games.jsonl.

This is destructive — cannot be undone via the UI.

topOnline.title: Top online
topOnline.subtitle: Top 100 currently most-played online F2P titles.

antiCheatList.title: Anti-Cheat Index
antiCheatList.subtitle: {{total}} active games grouped by {{families}} anti-cheat families.

topOffline.title: Top offline
topOffline.subtitle: Top 100 single-player or non-online F2P titles by concurrent players.

edit.title: Edit · {{name}}
edit.subtitleForm: Manual fields only. Auto-fetched data (name, reviews, players, etc.) is updated by the daily pipeline.
edit.subtitleJson: Full record JSON. Editing auto-fetched fields will be overwritten on next daily refetch unless you also disable the pipeline.
edit.noChanges: No changes yet — adjust a field above to enable Save.
edit.unsignedHint: GPG key not unlocked — this commit will land but show as Unverified on GitHub. Unlock in Settings to sign.
edit.signInDescription: Editing requires GitHub authentication. Go to Settings → Sign in.
edit.branchAdvancedBody: The daily pipeline committed while you were editing.
edit.antiCheatNotePlaceholder: Notes on AC behavior, kernel driver, etc.
edit.jsonPowerMode: Power-user mode: replaces the entire record. {{addedAt}} is preserved from the original; everything else is committed verbatim.
edit.acLockedOffline: Anti-cheat fields are disabled for offline games. Switch type to online to edit.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Authentication, theme, and preferences.
settings.languageHint: Switch UI language. Long-form legal copy stays in English.

time.title: Time
time.subtitle: Release-year histogram of the catalog, plus a cumulative timeline of how the dataset grew.

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Top 100 community tags. Generic tags (Free to Play, Indie, etc.) are filtered out.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Distribution of user-review percentages, binned by 10%.

players.title: Player tiers
players.subtitle: Online F2P games bucketed by current concurrent players.

antiCheat.title: Anti-cheat
antiCheat.subtitle: Distribution of kernel-level / user-mode / no anti-cheat across the top 18 genres.

drm.title: DRM & paid DLC
drm.subtitle: F2P shouldn't mean clean — many titles still ship with third-party DRM and/or paid DLC. This breakdown helps spot the "truly free" pool.

delisted.title: Delisted games
delisted.subtitle: {{count}} games that have been removed from the catalogue — either no longer free-to-play or fully delisted from Steam. Source: scripts/removed_games.jsonl.

languages.title: Languages
languages.subtitle: For each of the top 30 languages, how many games support it via interface, audio, and subtitles.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Recent {{count}} commits on {{branch}}. Verified commits are signed by the author's registered GPG key.

add.title: Add games
add.subtitleVisitor: Paste a Steam link → it gets queued for the daily ingest pipeline.
add.subtitleOwner: Paste Steam links → queues to {{tempInfo}}. The existing {{ingestNew}} workflow fetches Steam metadata (name, reviews, players, languages, anti-cheat) and merges your manual overrides on top. Refresh in ~3–5 minutes to see new rows.
add.ownerOnly: Only the repo owner can add or edit. Visitors browse read-only.
add.signInRequired: Sign in to GitHub as the repo owner to add games. Read-only browse works without sign-in.
add.commitsUnsigned: commits will be unsigned · unlock GPG in Settings to sign
add.singleAddDesc: Paste a Steam URL or appid. Optional: pre-fill manual fields so the ingest pipeline preserves them.
add.bulkAddDescLinks: One Steam URL or appid per line.
add.bulkAddDescJson: One JSON object per line with link + optional manual fields.
add.emptyValuesSkipped: Empty values are skipped — the daily pipeline will fetch defaults from Steam. Anything you set here is preserved across refetches.

system.comingInPhase23: Coming in Phase 2 / Phase 3 of the roadmap.
system.autoDetectedLanguage: auto-detected from your browser on first load
system.noNetworkTooltip: No network — reads served from cache
system.updateReadyTooltip: A new version is ready — click to reload

cmdk.placeholder: Type a page, game name, or command…

donate.title: Support the project
donate.subtitle: If this list saved you a Steam-search rabbit hole, consider buying the maintainer a coffee or a sale-priced indie game. 100% goes to instant noodles + the next $5 sale binge.
donate.footnote: Same handles as in .github/FUNDING.yml. The GitHub repo's Sponsor button at the top of every page also funnels here.

platform.githubDesc: Recurring or one-off, fee-free, plugs straight into the maintainer's GitHub profile.
platform.kofiDesc: One-off coffees or monthly memberships. No fees on one-time tips.
platform.bmcDesc: Same idea as Ko-fi — different platform if you already have an account here.
platform.patreonDesc: Monthly tiers — best if you'd like the maintainer to keep this running long-term.
platform.paypalDesc: Direct PayPal.me link. Use this if every other platform is blocked in your region.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The repo, the dev, the stack, the legal stuff, and the fine print on accuracy.

dialogs.gameNotFoundBody: appid {{appid}} isn't in the current dataset. It may have been delisted, removed, or queued for the next ingest run.

health.title: Health
health.subtitle: Validation badges + maintenance triggers. Issues add up to {{total}} records flagged across {{categories}} categories.
health.groupDelistedDesc: Marked status=delisted (Steam page returned 404 / not free / blocked).
health.groupStaleDesc: last_updated is older than 30 days — daily pipeline may have skipped these.
health.groupMissingDesc: Missing one or more of: genre / type_game / safe.
health.groupKernelDesc: type_game=online with an anti-cheat name set but is_kernel_ac is null.
health.groupOnlineAcUnknownDesc: type_game=online with anti_cheat empty or '-'. May be unknown, may genuinely have none.
health.maintenanceDesc: Manually fire the existing GitHub Actions workflows. Requires sign-in with {{scope}} scope.

bulk.description_one: Toggle fields you want to update. Disabled fields stay as-is on each record. Edit lands in {{shards}} shard as one commit.
bulk.description_other: Toggle fields you want to update. Disabled fields stay as-is on each record. Edit lands in {{shards}} shards as one commit.
bulk.enableAtLeastOne: Enable at least one field to apply a bulk edit.

detail.openOnSteamDesktopHint: Opens in the Steam client if installed (steam://). Otherwise the browser will show a protocol prompt — fall back to the Web button.

403.title: Access denied
403.description: You don't have permission to do that. Only the repository owner can edit data — check your token in Settings.

404.title: Page not found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

419.title: Session expired
419.description: Your authentication token is no longer valid. Sign in again from Settings.

500.title: Something went wrong
500.description: An unexpected error occurred while rendering this page.

502.title: Bad gateway
502.description: An upstream service returned an invalid response. Try again shortly.

503.title: Service unavailable
503.description: The data source is temporarily unreachable. Cached data may still be available.

504.title: Request timed out
504.description: The server took too long to respond. Check your connection and try again.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: No network connection. Previously loaded data is still available.

boundary.chunkDescription: A new version was deployed while you were browsing. Reload to get the latest files.
